templates.name: My package is marked as delivered, but I can’t find it
templates.content: Please make sure you check your front door, neighbors and your mailbox. Some carriers may mark a package as delivered, but deliver it the following day. If it has been more than 3 business days, contact us at hello@oliveandjune.com and we will take care of it!

templates.name: How long do the Instant Mani press-ons last?
templates.content: There is a short term method and long term method depending on how long you want them to last! If your nail is fully covered and there are no air bubbles, they can last 7+ days. If you just want to wear them for a night, use one thin line of glue only.

templates.name: Can I reuse the Super Stick Mani press-ons?
templates.content: We do not recommend re-using the press-ons in the Super Stick Mani. While you can, removal of the nails might cause the nails to bend slightly, resulting in a less natural look.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/oliveandjune and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/oliveandjune

templates.name: Are the Instant Mani press-ons waterproof?
templates.content: The Instant Mani press-ons themselves are waterproof, although the more your nails are soaked in hot water the quicker the glue will dissolve. Showers and washing dishes are fine, but a hot bath may cause them to begin to lift more quickly.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3-4 business days and we usually ship via UPS. Once shipped it will take 5-10 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Can I reuse the Instant Mani press-ons?
templates.content: Yes! You can reuse the Instant Mani press-ons several times as long as you remove with warm soapy water.

templates.name: Do you sell the buffer, files, cuticle serum, a la carte?
templates.content: We do - at most Target locations! We recommend checking their app to see if your local store has them in stock or ordering them online from their app.

templates.name: How do I know what size Super Stick Mani press-ons to get?
templates.content: We're proud to offer the most inclusive sizes for tab press-ons on the market. Each package contains one shape and length (ex: Short, Round), but has 32 nails and 16 sizes in the pack. Two of every nail size is included in every pack! Short or Extra Short refer to the length of the nail, not the size.

templates.name: How do I avoid chipping?
templates.content:
Chipping always comes down to the prep! To make sure your mani can be long-lasting, make sure you're avoiding hand washing during the prep steps, and avoiding showering right before you paint, as water can cause your nail plate to expand! 

Remove polish with the Nail Polish Remover Pot, and avoid touching your hair, towels, etc so no oil can transfer to your nail bed. Then, paint in 2-3 thin coats while giving the coats at least 5-10 minutes of dry time in between. Seal with Super Glossy Top Coat and reapply every 2-3 days to really lock in the mani and keep it fresh! 

If you're still experiencing chipping after following these steps, add in Nail Primer to your routine before painting to help further dehydrate your nail plate.

templates.name: Do you have a gift note option?
templates.content: You can add a gift note when you check out for your all orders except gift cards, since those are electronic!

templates.name: Is the buffer the same grit on all sides?
templates.content: Yes! It's a gentle grit that helps you not buff too much too quickly and can easily assist with cuticle care.

templates.name: How do I apply the nail stickers?
templates.content:
Try these steps for applying our nail stickers!

1. Apply stickers to polish that is completely dry (otherwise it will indent your polish). Sometimes waiting until the next day after painting is best!
2. Press down firmly around the edges of the sticker. Tweezers can help with this and with the application!
3. Seal with two thin coats of Super Glossy Top Coat.
4. Top coat your nails every 2-3 days to keep your sticker mani looking fresh!

templates.name: Where do you ship?
templates.content: We currently ship to the contiguous United States and Canada. We are unable to ship to Alaska, Hawaii, or Puerto Rico due to shipping restrictions with nail polish, which is classified as a potentially hazardous material. However, we are available in some Targets and Walmarts located in Alaska and Hawaii so make sure to check the app to see if your local store carries or ships to you!

templates.content: Try our Mani System, Pedi System or Complete System with a Beginner Shade polish! It has all the tools you need for salon-perfect nails at home, and a sheer/metallic polish will help you learn the basics of painting while enjoying a beautiful color!

templates.name: How do I achieve a smooth finish?
templates.content:
We recommend these tips for the best smooth mani finish!

- If you need to mix your polish, roll it between your hands rather than shaking it, which can cause bubbles.
- Prep your nails with our Nail Polish Remover Pot or our Nail Primer to make sure the nail plates are clean and dry.
-Start with a thin first coat and a thicker second. Thin coats help prevent bubbling!
- Wait 5-10 minutes in between coats for the polish to adhere.
- Seal with Super Glossy Top Coat and reapply it every 2-3 days to keep your mani fresh!

templates.name: What ingredients are in your products?
templates.content:
We are all about creating the cleanest formulation possible without compromising on performance. That's why we formulate to be "15-free" which means we are free of fifteen harmful chemicals commonly found in nail polishes including Formaldehyde, Toluene, DBP, Formaldehyde Resin, Camphor, Ethyl Tosylamide, Xylene, Triphenyl Phosphate (TPHP), Acetone, Animal-Derived Ingredients, Bisphenol-A, Nonylphenol Ethoxylate, Parabens, Sulfate, Phthalates. 

Our formula is also vegan and cruelty free! You can find a full list of ingredients on any of our product pages as well.

templates.name: How do I give myself a manicure?
templates.content:
We have some great resources on our site! Check out our Mani 101 guide here: https://oliveandjune.com/pages/oliveuniversity We also recommend:

1. Preparing - You'll want to make sure you're avoiding hand washing and showering for at least 30 mins to an hour before you paint
2. Make sure you are not using a separate base coat, as our polish has a built-in one.
3. Prep nails with the Nail Polish Remover Pot, and avoid touching your hair, towels, etc so no oil can transfer to your nail bed.
4. Then, always paint 2 - 3 VERY THIN coats and give each one at least 5 - 10 minutes of dry time before applying another. 
5. Clean up any polish that is on your cuticles, and make sure it is only on the nail itself. That will help prevent any peeling around your cuticles!
6. Seal with your Top Coat and reapply every 2 - 3 days to really lock in the mani and keep it fresh!

templates.name: Is there an expedited shipping option?
templates.content: Nail polish is considered a hazardous material therefore it can't be expedited via air, but we do offer an expedited ground option (UPS) which should get your package to you within 3 - 7 days after processing.

templates.name: Do I need a base coat?
templates.content: You don't! Our polish is formulated with the base coat already built-in. Some people like a sheer coat of EC or Nail Brightener underneath darker colors to prevent staining, but this is not necessary for everyone! We also offer our Nail Primer which is the ideal dry canvas that helps polish adhere so your mani lasts longer than ever before.

templates.name: What can I redeem points for?
templates.content: You can redeem your points with any purchase. Just add your loyalty item to your cart before checkout. We will continually add and switch out our product offerings so let us know what you like to see!

templates.name: How often should you replace your tools?
templates.content: The tools will tell you when it's time for a replacement, as it depends on how frequently you're using them. If you have any questions about your specific tool, please email our Customer Care team at hello@oliveandjune.com!

templates.name: Are the Super Stick Mani press-ons waterproof?
templates.content: The press-ons themselves are waterproof, although the more your nails are soaked in hot water the quicker the adhesion will weaken. Showers and washing hands and dishes are fine, but a long hot bath may cause them to begin to lift more quickly.

templates.name: Does your remover take off gel?
templates.content: We don't recommend using our remover to remove gel polish. Pure acetone is needed to remove gel and our remover is acetone free. To remove gel polish, we went live with one of our manicurists who spilled all of the secrets. Watch it here: https://www.instagram.com/tv/B-S8IWyhfKT/

templates.name: How long do the Super Stick Mani press-ons last?
templates.content: The Super Stick Mani is the longest-lasting tab mani on the market, designed for wear up to 7 days. However, they are also the ideal mani to wear for a special night or a weekend. The choice is yours, and there is no difference in application based on desired length of wear.

templates.name: Why are the clippers flat?
templates.content: This is how you get every nail shape - square, squoval, round, almond, etc! Curved clippers push you into a curved shape automatically.

templates.name: How do I remove the Instant Mani press-ons?
templates.content: To repeatedly use your Instant Mani press-ons, we recommend using warm soapy water. For quick removal, we recommend our removal system which you can purchase on the site!

templates.name: How do I remove the Super Stick Mani press-ons?
templates.content: When you're ready to remove your press-ons, simply lift the press-on nail off the nail. If there is any remaining tab on the nail, simply peel the tab off. You can also use the included wooden pusher to remove the nail. For stubborn press-ons, try soaking the nails in warm, soapy water to loosen the adhesive.
